title: Greener Leaf Litter
description: Changes Leaf Litter's color depending on the biome, just like leaves.
body:
**'Greener Leaf Litter'** is a resource pack that aims to make the leaf litter more life like and less brown, making the environments and biomes look greener, fresher and better.

This resource pack changes the colormap texture for the leaf litter to match closer to the colormap of the leaf blocks and foliage blocks you seen in game. This Results in the leaf litter changing their shade and tint depending on the biome, just the same as foliage and leaves. This is perfect for those who want a _GREENER_ natural look.

This resource pack also changes the handheld item to be green, instead of brown.

**The Following are biomes that have independant colors for the leaf litter block;**
- Forest & Plains
- Birch Forest & Old Birch Growth
- Flower Forest
- Meadow
- Cherry Grove
- Jungle, Sparse Jungle & Bamboo Jungle
- Savana & Desert
- Taiga & Old Growth Taiga 
- Snowy Plains & other snow biomes
- Pale Gardn - Unique Grey Color

[See Biome Images Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greener-leaf-litter/gallery)

**Does Not Work in the following;**
- Dark Oak Forest
- Swamp & Mangrove Swamp
- Bandlands

This is due to colors being hard coded into the game, resulting in the default brown colors. 

When the game gets update to allow us to change the color maps for these biomes, I will update the colors for them.

**Works only in;**
- 1.21.5 & Later
- 25w08a & Later
